hero.badge: Kigereranyo cya 40% ku kwezi kwa mbere
hero.subtitle: Ohereza pakiti. Wishyura igihe pakiti igeze — niba ubishaka. Kohereza neza, kuva ku wohereje kugera ku wohererejwe. Hitamo MoMo, Airtel Money, cyangwa Cash on Delivery hamwe n'amafaranga make y'ibanza. Kurikirana buri ntambwe, emeza ukoresheje kode y'imibare 6 ku rugo.

problem.title: Kohereza pakiti i Kigali ntibikwiye kuba ipari.
problem.subtitle: Buri munsi, abanyarwanda baracyahura n'ibibazo bisa nibi:
problem.card1_body: Ntubigire mu rwego rw'amayobera. Aboha bacu bemejwe kandi barakurikiranwa.
problem.card2_title: Utakaza igihe utazi aho pakiti igeze?
problem.card2_body: Ntukomeze gutegereza umusi wose. Reba aho pakiti igeze mu gihe nyacyo.
problem.card3_body: Ntibikongere kubaho. Twita ku pakiti yawe nk'aho ari iyacu.

promise.title: Igihe cyawe na pakiti yawe — ni byo dushyira mbere.
promise.subtitle: Twemeza ko buri pakiti igera ku gihe kandi mu mutekano.

features.title: Uburyo bworoshye bwo kohereza
features.f1_body: Erekana aderesi ku ikarita. Twebwe twe dukora ibisigaye.
features.f2_body: Ishyura amafaranga make y'ibanza. Uwakira yishyura ibisigaye ku rugo.
features.f3_body: Uwakira atanga kode kugira ngo iyemeze itangwa ry'ipakiti.

waitlist.title: Ba uwa mbere kumenya iyo Parcela itangiye.
waitlist.subtitle: Andika imeyili yawe maze tuzakubwira igihe cya mbere kandi uzabona kigereranyo cya 40%.

footer.tagline: Kohereza pakiti mu mutekano muri Kigali.
